'''Joiol''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Orus sector/Legends|Orus sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] that teemed with life.

==History==
Around [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Talon Karrde]] suspected that [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] shipments of [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] may have been coming through the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], but later found it was false.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Orus sector and, consequently, Joiol, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
